known_issues: Flavour selected as AQI during upload shows as 'Premium' in reports — flavour value not being saved/read correctly
Unit count mismatch: uploading 4 files (4 units) shows as 3 units in reports — off-by-one or duplicate detection issue

existing_features.title: Fix the flavour value not being correctly saved or read during CSV/XLS import: when the user selects 'AQI' as the flavour in the CSVImportSection selector before uploading, the stored ReportEntry records must persist 'AQI' as the flavour — not default to or be overwritten by 'Premium'. The flavour shown in the Reports table must exactly match what was selected at upload time.

Fix the unit count mismatch in Reports: when 4 files each representing 1 distinct unit are uploaded (4 files = 4 units), the Reports table footer must show 'Totals (4 units)' and the table must display all 4 rows. Currently only 3 units appear, indicating either an off-by-one error in distinct unit counting, a duplicate detection false positive, or one record being silently dropped during batch upsert.
